steroids.notes_updates: Continue until hemodynamically stable, then taper.

endocrine.notes_updates: Give 1-2 hours BEFORE iodine. Add propranolol for tachycardia.
Give hydrocortisone 50-100mg IV BEFORE thyroxine (risk of adrenal crisis).
Titrate to drop glucose by 3-4 mmol/L/hr. Reduce to 0.05 units/kg/hr when glucose <14 mmol/L.
Add dextrose when glucose <16 mmol/L. Insulin infusion 0.05 units/kg/hr.
Cardioprotective. Does NOT lower K+, protects myocardium.
Onset 15-30 min. Lasts 4-6 hours. Monitor for hypoglycaemia.

other.adult_dose: 2.5mg/kg IV bolus, repeat PRN to max 10mg/kg
other.paediatric_dose: 2.5mg/kg IV bolus, repeat PRN to max 10mg/kg
other.notes_updates: Discontinue trigger agents. Cool patient. Bicarbonate for acidosis.

other.adult_dose: 2.5mg PO q8h, titrate to max 10mg q8h
other.notes_updates: Discontinue offending agent. Supportive care. Dantrolene may be used.
Discontinue serotonergic agents. Supportive care. Benzodiazepines for agitation.
